detail.description:
Can you seat them all?
Welcome to That’s My Seat – Logic Puzzle, the hit game where every level is a fun brain teaser! Your challenge: place each character in the correct seat by following clever rules. Easy to start, but only the sharpest minds will master them all.
Why over 25 million players love it:
- Over 1000 puzzles and special levels with tricky challenges, endless pop culture references, and celebrity-inspired cameos.
- Funny & diverse characters: celebrities, cartoon-style figures, ani
detail.developer: ROOFTOP GAMES OYUN TEKNOLOJILERI ANONIM SIRKETI
detail.releaseNotes:
A huge update just landed in That's My Seat! Here's what's waiting for you:

- New Levels & Story: Fresh levels and a brand-new Story!
- Monthly Events: Unique mini-games every month with special prizes you won't want to miss.
- Quality of Life: Smoother gameplay, faster loading, and bug fixes for a better puzzle experience.

Please keep your game updated for the best experience!
Need support? Contact us at "contact-tms@maglab.com.tr".
